description:
The ReqView project contains an SRS (System Requirements Specification) document and a linked TESTS (Test Cases) document. Update the 'Status' attribute of the SRS requirements based on the verification results in the TESTS document using the following logic: 

- If any linked test case has a status of 'Rejected', set the SRS requirement status to 'Rejected'.
- If all linked test cases have a status of 'Approved', set the SRS requirement status to 'Approved'.
- If there are no links or a mix of statuses including 'Draft', set the SRS requirement status to 'Draft'.

Save the project after completing the updates.
